LandingPage.title: A free, open source alternative to Language Learning apps
LandingPage.description: FOSSLingo is an alternative to traditional language learning apps that is Private, Community Maintained, and Open-Source under the AGPLv3 License. I, iddu01, started this project, simply because I think language learning should be free for all.
LandingPage.contributorsNotice: If you are a developer, UI/UX designer, artist, able to contribute voice samples, fluent in any language, or anything like that, please contribute to FOSSLingo! Even if you have never contributed to Open-Source, I'm here to help! You can reach out at

CoursesPage.title: Courses
CoursesPage.notice: FOSSLingo is a project, currently only maintained by one person. As such, there is currently only going to be one course: Spanish (Worldwide). Once the project gains more attention, more languages can, and will be added down the road.
CoursesPage.explanation: Spanish was chosen as I have a friend that is fluent in Spanish (from a Spanish speaking country), as such it will be easy to make a Spanish course as the first course for FOSSLingo

descriptions.NextJS: The web client is coded in Next.js / React.js. Development has started, but no ETA has been finalized. If you are experienced in Next app development and would like to help, create a pull request at FOSSLingo/web!
descriptions.iOS: The iOS Client is planned to be coded in Swift. Development has not started, and no ETA has been finalized. If you are experienced in iOS app development, create a discussion
descriptions.Android: The Android Client is planned to be coded in the future. Development has not started, and no ETA has been finalized. If you are experienced in Android app development, create a discussion
descriptions.Linux: The Linux Client is planned to be coded in the future. Development has not started, and no ETA has been finalized. If you are experienced in Linux app development, create a discussion
descriptions.macOS: The macOS Client is planned to be coded in Swift. Development has not started, and no ETA has been finalized. If you are experienced in macOS app development, create a discussion
descriptions.Windows: The Windows Client is planned to be coded in the future. Development has not started, and no ETA has been finalized. If you are experienced in Windows app development, create a discussion

MissionPage.title: Our Mission
MissionPage.bodyText: FOSSLingo's mission is to make language learning free for all. I (iddu01) think that learning new things should be free for all. No exceptions. A human should not be limited on what they can learn based on their income, or money.

CreditsPage.title: Credits
CreditsPage.creditsText: Credits for all libraries and tools used for FOSSLingo can be found in the GitHub repo 'FOSSLingo/web', under CREDITS.md

LicensePage.title: License
LicensePage.explanation: The FOSSLingo website, clients, and backend are licensed under the copyleft GNU Affero General Public License v3.0 (AGPL-3.0).

softwareQuestions.1: 1. If you modify any FOSSLingo software and host it for others to use, you must redistribute the modified source code.
softwareQuestions.2: 2. The modified source code must be released under the same license as the original code, AGPL-3.0.
softwareQuestions.3: 3. You must preserve the original copyright notices, include the AGPL-3.0 license, and make the corresponding source code available to users of your modified version.

LicensePage.alternatively: Alternatively, the FOSSLingo language resources (grammar explanations, lessons, vocabulary, and other educational content) are licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0 International (CC BY-SA 4.0) unless otherwise noted. This means:

resourcesQuestions.1: 1. Attribution (The BY part): In this case, You must provide appropriate attribution to the original author, include a link to the CC BY-SA 4.0 license, and indicate whether changes were made.
resourcesQuestions.2: 2. If you modify, remix, or transform the original resources, you must release the modifications under the same license.

LicensePage.disclaimer: Disclaimer: This is not legal advice! This is a very big simplification of the licenses used. The full licenses can be found here (Hyperlinks):
